title: Rest Refreshes.
content:
Lay by the good a while; a resting field
    Will, after ease, a richer harvest yield;
    Trees this year bear: next, they their wealth withhold:
    Continual reaping makes a land wax old.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Rest Refreshes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
